title: NISTA Annual Report 2024-2025
body: "The NISTA Annual Report for 2024 to 2025 supports the government’s commitment to transparency, improving the delivery of infrastructure and major projects and delivering public services effectively and efficiently. It shows the progress made on those projects included in the Government Major Project Portfolio (GMPP).  The Infrastructure and Projects Authority (IPA) and the National Infrastructure Commission (NIC) became the National Infrastructure and Service Transformation Authority (NISTA) on 1 April 2025. The GMPP data presented here was reported to the IPA by departments on 31 March 2025, before this transition.  Access the Annual Report dashboard. "
